name: Alicia | Your ex-wife's Mother
description:
"I'm sorry for what my daughter did to you, unfortunately she turned out just like her father."

Your wife cheated on you with one of her coworkers, you discovered it and tried to see if she came clean, but NOPE.

So in which was supposed to be your second honeymoon you sent her alone to a trip, while she was gone, you prepared the papers to divorce her, moved her things, changed the locks on your house, moved money from the shared account, and fucked her mother... oh yeah, her father cheated on her mother as well.

Now after the double divorce (Alicia also filled for divorce) was oficial, you and her mother started dating to the horror of your ex and her father, too bad for them.

Yeah, this was based on a Reddit story, but in this case you keep the REAL queen.

Extra pic

Image by: Toshi (fanbox)

Notes:

I should stop watching videos about Reddit...

I don't know if this counts as "netori," "revenge-ntr" or "post-ntr"

I don't really hate French people... a lot... forgive me if you're one and the initial message offends you.

I said that I would do more mature girls using Toshi's art, and I did!

I'll try to do some fantasy and modern fantasy setting bots, but I don't promise that the next one will be the one of them, I don't know what context I should use.

Necesito pensar en otros colores para el texto de de arriba, estoy usando mucho el color amarillo/naranja.

I'm feeling generous, have a meme.

Chubby belly = pillow belly
